TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Piyaway, title = Piyaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piyaway} }

S.FORM: qalang Piyaway ga cyux maki squ beh qalang Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. qalang Piyaway ga ini tehuk kbhul hi tayal nya,mpuw msyaw ngasal nyux sqaniy,Song Cyuw Lin ru Tang bwan ngasal tgluw nyux maki sqaniy, si say mha pyux qsinuw ru cikuy tayal na qutux qalang. puqing bnkis nha ga minkahul kgogan Botunokan.qalang qaniy ga nyux maki squ To'ing Piyasan kinhangan nqu Qwilan,te kraya nya ga qalang Qwilan te yahu nya ga qalang Raga Bnay,musa 600～1200 meta kinwagq na umi,nyux te 'law kint'an llyung,qmuzi rgyax Tlaman mkura te htgan wagi. rhzyal kki'an lalu qalangqaniy ga sazing pintke'an nha; 1.rhiyal qaniy ga hbk'an balay na qutux qerang,Piyaway san ke tayal ru si nha lhengiy nha Piyaway smlalu la. 2.sraral mga maki qutux kneril tayal blaq balay lungan nya ma,nanu s'agal nha lalu nya smlalu la. babaw nya m'Bokusi 宋正喜 yaqeh hazi pongan Piyaway qaniy,trang 1976 kawas lga skayal nya Gokosyo yugun Ri'an qu lalu nya la.misuw qaniy 10 kawas mtnaq kwara inlungan qalang mha aki kbzihan loziy lalu raral,ru Piyaway loziy lalu qalang qaniy. pinsalan raral ga,maki squ'law kraya 200 meta qutux rhiyal mzyunaw.pnongan ke bnkis ga:pira kbhul kawas sraral ga kbhul msyaw ngasal minnaki kya ma. puqing imi ke pinsalan:"rhiyal ka pinsrngyan,te sazing ga rhiyal ka pinkyalan." pinqzyu qu bnkis:"pinsalan qasa ga,wal htgal skbahing na zyuwaw mgaw.baha hmswa kahul pinsqehan wal hqelan squliq." mkura rgyax Qesu,kmayal loziy bnkis mha:"raral ga sazing mrhuw bnkis maki kya(ini baqiy lalu na sazing bnkis qasa,nyux baqun ga bnkis na Cyuw ka Song sazing bwan ngasal tgluw.) sazing ngasal qaniy ga mqhyaw na kinlkahan. maki qutux ryax sazing ngasal qaniy ga, zyuwaw na tamun kblayun qwaw ru msazyu la.mqqun ima qu balay nya, ru htgal na zyuwaw mkkut la,maki mhuqil saxa nha lwah. mkayal qu bnkis,rhiyal qaniy lga wiwal nyux syusan la,aring sqaniy lga iyat ki'un.nanu gluw na Cyuw hiya ga mkura te 'law kraya Qwayux qasa tngasal.gluw na Song hiya ga mkura te 'zil kraya Boliq qasa. mkayal mha laxiy ta pklapa, qelis qaniy ga si aki sa qsahuy lungan nha kryax." babaw nya wahan tuqiy turuy lga, tgyut aki mwah kbzeh Pinsalan loziy,ana ga snyusan qu rhiyal qaniy son nha,ini swaya maki kya qu tayal. ru mwah smhzi te kyahu nya cikay sobeh squ tuqiy turuy qaniy la. wayal qu ryax,kibahan nha sazing ngasal qaniy lga mbbiq squliq uziy la,ini psparis inlungan nha la.iyat balay kinqeri ga,1952 kawas lga mwah qu Kyokay,aring kya msblaq mssi' inlungan ru 'myuw inlungan magal pinshota utux,kwara qu pinsqehan raral ga wiwal nqu wal nha qlyu'un llyung gogan kwara la. kayal qalang ga nyux qutux Cyoro Kyokay,misuw qaniy ga Hane Taya Bokusi nyux sqaniy,tayal sqaniy ga skrangi nha "qutux ngasal " mlahang Kyokay qaniy. mpuw gaga pincbaqan Sesyo nyux nha glgan,kwara bbnkis ga skrangi nha yaba yaya kmita.mqyanux na snhyan ka sinnlwan.mkllahang,mqasuw na qnxan.qaniy qu nyux syan inlungan na qalang. kyokay pinbahuw na qalang ga:qwirux lipi qapu kaway ruma. 3 byacing ga mamu bway witak.4 byacing ga klahan na lipi ka ali ruma,5 byacing tehuk 8 byacing lga qwirux kaway ru kaway sbing ka krariy,9 byacing lga mamu bway qapu la. 1.gong Boliq kni'an qalang kahul gogan sraral,tngasal te llingay na gong,nanu tayal ga gong ka kni'an bniks sraral son nha,puqing kni'an qalang Piyaway sraral gaw,ktan uziy hnaga tunux qnryan kbhul kawas sraral. 2.tuqiy Qesuw rgyax Qesuw- qaniy ga tuqiy osa rgyax Qesuw,sintqyan na lelaqi ka bbnkis.hahul tuqiy turuy (7 Seng) mkura tuqiy Uraw qmazeh, cikuy turuy ga tehuk squ qmazeh na bnkis Tomi,mzyup kya lga mhkani na kakay la.tuqiy qesuw qaniy ga blaq balay hlahuy nya, qqsinuw qqhuniq.misuw qaniy ga nyux galan wahan mqbaq na laqi. 3. Qwayux Qwayux qaniy ga kni'an bnkis raral uziy,misuw qaniy ga yasa qu nyux galan niqan qsya na qalang Piyaway,blaq balay wahan mita qqsinuw.qlyan ga qqbhniq ktan,mhngan ga mqwas qu qpatung, mita mqu kmyap nniqun nya. 4. Uraw lingay nya qutux b'bu rgyax ga snyan qongu na Gipun sraral, sbu' nya qalang tayal,smngungu squ tayal- (Qwayux Bnay Raga Sbunaw Kgiran Piyaway).rgyax qaniy ga tlngayan na yulung krryax,qlyan ga baqun rm'r mita rgyax Nace Nagu Xuxu Rr'an, mhngan ga ktan qu pnilaw na hogan To'ing ru bbengah,blaq balay wahan rm'ra mita nnanu gaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi mrkyas tuqi 'san kahul Cyama mkura tuqiy osa Girang,kahul Girang ga mluw tuqiy mkura squ Cyama,tuqiy nqu Pehng(Tay 7 Seng) te 36 Kori bniru tuqiy lga tehuk la.

qalang Piyaway ga cyux maki squ beh qalang Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. qalang Piyaway ga ini tehuk kbhul hi tayal nya,mpuw msyaw ngasal nyux sqaniy,Song Cyuw Lin ru Tang bwan ngasal tgluw nyux maki sqaniy, si say mha pyux qsinuw ru cikuy tayal na qutux qalang. puqing bnkis nha ga minkahul kgogan Botunokan.qalang qaniy ga nyux maki squ To'ing Piyasan kinhangan nqu Qwilan,te kraya nya ga qalang Qwilan te yahu nya ga qalang Raga Bnay,musa 600～1200 meta kinwagq na umi,nyux te 'law kint'an llyung,qmuzi rgyax Tlaman mkura te htgan wagi. rhzyal kki'an lalu qalangqaniy ga sazing pintke'an nha; 1.rhiyal qaniy ga hbk'an balay na qutux qerang,Piyaway san ke tayal ru si nha lhengiy nha Piyaway smlalu la. 2.sraral mga maki qutux kneril tayal blaq balay lungan nya ma,nanu s'agal nha lalu nya smlalu la. babaw nya m'Bokusi 宋正喜 yaqeh hazi pongan Piyaway qaniy,trang 1976 kawas lga skayal nya Gokosyo yugun Ri'an qu lalu nya la.misuw qaniy 10 kawas mtnaq kwara inlungan qalang mha aki kbzihan loziy lalu raral,ru Piyaway loziy lalu qalang qaniy. pinsalan raral ga,maki squ'law kraya 200 meta qutux rhiyal mzyunaw.pnongan ke bnkis ga:pira kbhul kawas sraral ga kbhul msyaw ngasal minnaki kya ma. puqing imi ke pinsalan:"rhiyal ka pinsrngyan,te sazing ga rhiyal ka pinkyalan." pinqzyu qu bnkis:"pinsalan qasa ga,wal htgal skbahing na zyuwaw mgaw.baha hmswa kahul pinsqehan wal hqelan squliq." mkura rgyax Qesu,kmayal loziy bnkis mha:"raral ga sazing mrhuw bnkis maki kya(ini baqiy lalu na sazing bnkis qasa,nyux baqun ga bnkis na Cyuw ka Song sazing bwan ngasal tgluw.) sazing ngasal qaniy ga mqhyaw na kinlkahan. maki qutux ryax sazing ngasal qaniy ga, zyuwaw na tamun kblayun qwaw ru msazyu la.mqqun ima qu balay nya, ru htgal na zyuwaw mkkut la,maki mhuqil saxa nha lwah. mkayal qu bnkis,rhiyal qaniy lga wiwal nyux syusan la,aring sqaniy lga iyat ki'un.nanu gluw na Cyuw hiya ga mkura te 'law kraya Qwayux qasa tngasal.gluw na Song hiya ga mkura te 'zil kraya Boliq qasa. mkayal mha laxiy ta pklapa, qelis qaniy ga si aki sa qsahuy lungan nha kryax." babaw nya wahan tuqiy turuy lga, tgyut aki mwah kbzeh Pinsalan loziy,ana ga snyusan qu rhiyal qaniy son nha,ini swaya maki kya qu tayal. ru mwah smhzi te kyahu nya cikay sobeh squ tuqiy turuy qaniy la. wayal qu ryax,kibahan nha sazing ngasal qaniy lga mbbiq squliq uziy la,ini psparis inlungan nha la.iyat balay kinqeri ga,1952 kawas lga mwah qu Kyokay,aring kya msblaq mssi' inlungan ru 'myuw inlungan magal pinshota utux,kwara qu pinsqehan raral ga wiwal nqu wal nha qlyu'un llyung gogan kwara la. kayal qalang ga nyux qutux Cyoro Kyokay,misuw qaniy ga Hane Taya Bokusi nyux sqaniy,tayal sqaniy ga skrangi nha "qutux ngasal " mlahang Kyokay qaniy. mpuw gaga pincbaqan Sesyo nyux nha glgan,kwara bbnkis ga skrangi nha yaba yaya kmita.mqyanux na snhyan ka sinnlwan.mkllahang,mqasuw na qnxan.qaniy qu nyux syan inlungan na qalang. kyokay pinbahuw na qalang ga:qwirux lipi qapu kaway ruma. 3 byacing ga mamu bway witak.4 byacing ga klahan na lipi ka ali ruma,5 byacing tehuk 8 byacing lga qwirux kaway ru kaway sbing ka krariy,9 byacing lga mamu bway qapu la. 1.gong Boliq kni'an qalang kahul gogan sraral,tngasal te llingay na gong,nanu tayal ga gong ka kni'an bniks sraral son nha,puqing kni'an qalang Piyaway sraral gaw,ktan uziy hnaga tunux qnryan kbhul kawas sraral. 2.tuqiy Qesuw rgyax Qesuw- qaniy ga tuqiy osa rgyax Qesuw,sintqyan na lelaqi ka bbnkis.hahul tuqiy turuy (7 Seng) mkura tuqiy Uraw qmazeh, cikuy turuy ga tehuk squ qmazeh na bnkis Tomi,mzyup kya lga mhkani na kakay la.tuqiy qesuw qaniy ga blaq balay hlahuy nya, qqsinuw qqhuniq.misuw qaniy ga nyux galan wahan mqbaq na laqi. 3. Qwayux Qwayux qaniy ga kni'an bnkis raral uziy,misuw qaniy ga yasa qu nyux galan niqan qsya na qalang Piyaway,blaq balay wahan mita qqsinuw.qlyan ga qqbhniq ktan,mhngan ga mqwas qu qpatung, mita mqu kmyap nniqun nya. 4. Uraw lingay nya qutux b'bu rgyax ga snyan qongu na Gipun sraral, sbu' nya qalang tayal,smngungu squ tayal- (Qwayux Bnay Raga Sbunaw Kgiran Piyaway).rgyax qaniy ga tlngayan na yulung krryax,qlyan ga baqun rm'r mita rgyax Nace Nagu Xuxu Rr'an, mhngan ga ktan qu pnilaw na hogan To'ing ru bbengah,blaq balay wahan rm'ra mita nnanu gaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi mrkyas tuqi 'san kahul Cyama mkura tuqiy osa Girang,kahul Girang ga mluw tuqiy mkura squ Cyama,tuqiy nqu Pehng(Tay 7 Seng) te 36 Kori bniru tuqiy lga tehuk la.
S.PHON: qalaŋ pijawaj ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu βeħ qalaŋ toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. qalaŋ pijawaj ɣa ini teħuk kβħul ħi tajal nja,mpuw ms~ɕjaw ŋas~ɕal njux s~ɕqanij,s~ɕoŋ ʦ~ʨjuw lin ru taŋ βwan ŋas~ɕal tɣluw njux maki s~ɕqanij, s~ɕi s~ɕaj mħa pjux qs~ɕinuw ru ʦ~ʨikuj tajal na qutux qalaŋ. puqiŋ βnkis~ɕ nħa ɣa minkaħul kɣoɣan βotunokan.qalaŋ qanij ɣa njux maki s~ɕqu toʔiŋ pijas~ɕan kinħaŋan nqu qwilan,te kraja nja ɣa qalaŋ qwilan te jaħu nja ɣa qalaŋ raɣa βnaj,mus~ɕa ******** meta kinwaɣq na umi,njux te ʔlaw kintʔan lljuŋ,qmuzi rɣjax tlaman mkura te ħtɣan waɣi. rħzjal kkiʔan lalu qalaŋqanij ɣa s~ɕaziŋ pintkeʔan nħa; *.rħijal qanij ɣa ħβkʔan βalaj na qutux qeraŋ,pijawaj s~ɕan ke tajal ru s~ɕi nħa lħeŋij nħa pijawaj s~ɕmlalu la. *.s~ɕraral mɣa maki qutux kneril tajal βlaq βalaj luŋan nja ma,nanu s~ɕʔaɣal nħa lalu nja s~ɕmlalu la. βaβaw nja mʔβokus~ɕi *** jaqeħ ħazi poŋan pijawaj qanij,traŋ **** kawas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕkajal nja ɣokos~ɕjo juɣun riʔan qu lalu nja la.mis~ɕuw qanij ** kawas~ɕ mtnaq kwara inluŋan qalaŋ mħa aki kβziħan lozij lalu raral,ru pijawaj lozij lalu qalaŋ qanij. pins~ɕalan raral ɣa,maki s~ɕquʔlaw kraja *** meta qutux rħijal mzjunaw.pnoŋan ke βnkis~ɕ ɣa:pira kβħul kawas~ɕ s~ɕraral ɣa kβħul ms~ɕjaw ŋas~ɕal minnaki kja ma. puqiŋ imi ke pins~ɕalan:"rħijal ka pins~ɕrŋjan,te s~ɕaziŋ ɣa rħijal ka pinkjalan." pinqzju qu βnkis~ɕ:"pins~ɕalan qas~ɕa ɣa,wal ħtɣal s~ɕkβaħiŋ na zjuwaw mɣaw.βaħa ħms~ɕwa kaħul pins~ɕqeħan wal ħqelan s~ɕquliq." mkura rɣjax qes~ɕu,kmajal lozij βnkis~ɕ mħa:"raral ɣa s~ɕaziŋ mrħuw βnkis~ɕ maki kja(ini βaqij lalu na s~ɕaziŋ βnkis~ɕ qas~ɕa,njux βaqun ɣa βnkis~ɕ na ʦ~ʨjuw ka s~ɕoŋ s~ɕaziŋ βwan ŋas~ɕal tɣluw.) s~ɕaziŋ ŋas~ɕal qanij ɣa mqħjaw na kinlkaħan. maki qutux rjax s~ɕaziŋ ŋas~ɕal qanij ɣa, zjuwaw na tamun kβlajun qwaw ru ms~ɕazju la.mqqun ima qu βalaj nja, ru ħtɣal na zjuwaw mkkut la,maki mħuqil s~ɕaxa nħa lwaħ. mkajal qu βnkis~ɕ,rħijal qanij lɣa wiwal njux s~ɕjus~ɕan la,ariŋ s~ɕqanij lɣa ijat kiʔun.nanu ɣluw na ʦ~ʨjuw ħija ɣa mkura te ʔlaw kraja qwajux qas~ɕa tŋas~ɕal.ɣluw na s~ɕoŋ ħija ɣa mkura te ʔzil kraja βoliq qas~ɕa. mkajal mħa laxij ta pklapa, qelis~ɕ qanij ɣa s~ɕi aki s~ɕa qs~ɕaħuj luŋan nħa krjax." βaβaw nja waħan tuqij turuj lɣa, tɣjut aki mwaħ kβzeħ pins~ɕalan lozij,ana ɣa s~ɕnjus~ɕan qu rħijal qanij s~ɕon nħa,ini s~ɕwaja maki kja qu tajal. ru mwaħ s~ɕmħzi te kjaħu nja ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕoβeħ s~ɕqu tuqij turuj qanij la. wajal qu rjax,kiβaħan nħa s~ɕaziŋ ŋas~ɕal qanij lɣa mββiq s~ɕquliq uzij la,ini ps~ɕparis~ɕ inluŋan nħa la.ijat βalaj kinqeri ɣa,**** kawas~ɕ lɣa mwaħ qu kjokaj,ariŋ kja ms~ɕβlaq ms~ɕs~ɕiʔ inluŋan ru ʔmjuw inluŋan maɣal pins~ɕħota utux,kwara qu pins~ɕqeħan raral ɣa wiwal nqu wal nħa qljuʔun lljuŋ ɣoɣan kwara la. kajal qalaŋ ɣa njux qutux ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj,mis~ɕuw qanij ɣa ħane taja βokus~ɕi njux s~ɕqanij,tajal s~ɕqanij ɣa s~ɕkraŋi nħa "qutux ŋas~ɕal " mlaħaŋ kjokaj qanij. mpuw ɣaɣa pinʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕes~ɕjo njux nħa ɣlɣan,kwara ββnkis~ɕ ɣa s~ɕkraŋi nħa jaβa jaja kmita.mqjanux na s~ɕnħjan ka s~ɕinnlwan.mkllaħaŋ,mqas~ɕuw na qnxan.qanij qu njux s~ɕjan inluŋan na qalaŋ. kjokaj pinβaħuw na qalaŋ ɣa:qwirux lipi qapu kawaj ruma. * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa mamu βwaj witak.* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa klaħan na lipi ka ali ruma,* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa qwirux kawaj ru kawaj s~ɕβiŋ ka krarij,* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa mamu βwaj qapu la. *.ɣoŋ βoliq kniʔan qalaŋ kaħul ɣoɣan s~ɕraral,tŋas~ɕal te lliŋaj na ɣoŋ,nanu tajal ɣa ɣoŋ ka kniʔan βniks~ɕ s~ɕraral s~ɕon nħa,puqiŋ kniʔan qalaŋ pijawaj s~ɕraral ɣaw,ktan uzij ħnaɣa tunux qnrjan kβħul kawas~ɕ s~ɕraral. *.tuqij qes~ɕuw rɣjax qes~ɕuw- qanij ɣa tuqij os~ɕa rɣjax qes~ɕuw,s~ɕintqjan na lelaqi ka ββnkis~ɕ.ħaħul tuqij turuj (* s~ɕeŋ) mkura tuqij uraw qmazeħ, ʦ~ʨikuj turuj ɣa teħuk s~ɕqu qmazeħ na βnkis~ɕ tomi,mzjup kja lɣa mħkani na kakaj la.tuqij qes~ɕuw qanij ɣa βlaq βalaj ħlaħuj nja, qqs~ɕinuw qqħuniq.mis~ɕuw qanij ɣa njux ɣalan waħan mqβaq na laqi. *. qwajux qwajux qanij ɣa kniʔan βnkis~ɕ raral uzij,mis~ɕuw qanij ɣa jas~ɕa qu njux ɣalan niqan qs~ɕja na qalaŋ pijawaj,βlaq βalaj waħan mita qqs~ɕinuw.qljan ɣa qqβħniq ktan,mħŋan ɣa mqwas~ɕ qu qpatuŋ, mita mqu kmjap nniqun nja. *. uraw liŋaj nja qutux βʔβu rɣjax ɣa s~ɕnjan qoŋu na ɣipun s~ɕraral, s~ɕβuʔ nja qalaŋ tajal,s~ɕmŋuŋu s~ɕqu tajal- (qwajux βnaj raɣa s~ɕβunaw kɣiran pijawaj).rɣjax qanij ɣa tlŋajan na juluŋ krrjax,qljan ɣa βaqun rmʔr mita rɣjax naʦ~ʨe naɣu xuxu rrʔan, mħŋan ɣa ktan qu pnilaw na ħoɣan toʔiŋ ru ββeŋaħ,βlaq βalaj waħan rmʔra mita nnanu ɣaw. ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqi ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqi mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan kaħul ʦ~ʨjama mkura tuqij os~ɕa ɣiraŋ,kaħul ɣiraŋ ɣa mluw tuqij mkura s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨjama,tuqij nqu peħŋ(taj * s~ɕeŋ) te ** kori βniru tuqij lɣa teħuk la.
